About

the Big, the Fat and the Pervs

We are BigFatPervs, a WLINTA collaborative group trying to create a safer, do it yourself, self-organized space for all WLINTA, BDSM, Qink (Queer and Kink) lovers. We encourage everyone who participates in our events to feel responsible and part of this community as we do. Ideas for workshops, help with organization or anything else that could be beneficial to the community are welcomed and appreciated.

If you would like to collaborate or contribute, please contact us by e-mail bigfatpervs@riseup.net

Donation

We have a suggested minimum donation of 5 euros. But what does it mean to donate?

Participating

It has come to our attention, us being BigFatPervs, that what it means to participate in a DIY space or be part of a DIY community is misunderstood or even unknown to some participants. Here you will find more detailed information of what assumptions we try to raise awareness for and what behaviors/attitudes are expected during our events.
